Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Let's now setup for a Time on Target (ToT) attack.

Note that Sea Power does not feature a ToT attack calculator. You will need to coordinate this kind of strike yourself. Let's now use the Map Tools to setup our own coordinated ToT attack from both Varyag and K-175.

Using the Compass/Circle tool, first right click on the enemy radar contacts and then draw out a circle with 242 nautical mile range (this is the range of the SS-N-3 Shaddock missile). Left click to set the circle.
